title: Archon + Jira: Drag a Ticket, Get a Pull Request (Live Build)
summary: Archon is a tool that automates AI-driven coding workflows triggered from multiple platforms including GitHub, Slack, Telegram, Discord, and Jira. Cole Medin demonstrates building a Jira adapter that automatically detects tickets, runs bug fixes via AI, opens pull requests, and posts results back to the ticket.
